expectations.text: Correctly targets the Ingredient interface (not RecipeSnapshot or SavedRecipe) as the location to add allergenTags
expectations.evidence: States 'The Ingredient interface is the single source of truth. Add one optional field' — correctly identifies Ingredient, not RecipeSnapshot/SavedRecipe

expectations.text: Makes field optional (allergenTags?: string[]) to preserve backward compatibility
expectations.evidence: Uses allergenTags?: string[] and explains 'Making it optional means every existing record stays valid with zero migration'

expectations.text: Correctly names the localStorage key as 'sourdough_recipes' (not 'bakeryos_recipes' or 'recipes')
expectations.evidence: States 'every existing record in localStorage (sourdough_recipes) stays valid' — correct key name

expectations.text: Notes that both flours and ingredients arrays on RecipeSnapshot contain Ingredient objects
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'RecipeCalculator.tsx holds flours and ingredients in state' but doesn't explicitly note that both flours and ingredients on RecipeSnapshot are Ingredient[] arrays. Focuses on component-level impact rather than type structure.

notes: Agent read types.ts and RecipeCalculator.tsx directly. Missed the explicit call-out that both RecipeSnapshot.flours and RecipeSnapshot.ingredients are Ingredient[] arrays.
